source_item.title: JSW Steel's profit doubles on revenue growth, beats estimates

slide1_hook.label: JSW Steel's Profit Just Doubled
slide1_hook.subhead: ₹4,696 crore in one quarter, more than anyone expected.

slide2_backstory.label: THE BACKSTORY
slide2_backstory.headline: India's Steel Giant Was Fighting Weak Prices
slide2_backstory.body: JSW Steel is one of India's biggest steelmakers, but weak steel prices and high costs had squeezed its profits for months. Analysts expected only a small recovery this quarter.

slide3_news.label: THE UPDATE
slide3_news.headline: Profit More Than Doubles, Crushes Estimates
slide3_news.body: Profit came in at ₹4,696 crore for Q1 FY27, more than double last year's ₹2,209 crore. Revenue rose 9.8% to ₹47,364 crore, well above what analysts expected.

slide4_why.label: WHY IT MATTERS
slide4_why.headline: A Steel Beat That Signals Broader Demand
bullets: Record sales show real demand, not just price gains
Falling debt gives JSW room to keep expanding
A big beat like this signals a stronger economy

slide5_engage.label: YOUR TAKE
slide5_engage.headline: JSW Steel beat estimates by over ₹1,100 crore while still spending big on expansion. Is this the start of a steel supercycle in India, or just a one quarter blip?
slide5_engage.cta: Follow for daily Indian business stories that actually matter. Drop your take in the comments 👇
